title: WIP Refactor filtering moving from CLI to server
body:
* Filter on server side to reduce amount of data pushed over Varlink

Signed-off-by: Jhon Honce <jhonce@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude I uploaded the WIP so you can review where I'm going
